description_long: This bungalow is a modern residential building with a combination of single and double-story sections, featuring a dark, multi-gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The structure is set within a fenced rectangular plot, surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn and a paved driveway that curves around the house. A circular feature, possibly a fountain or planter, is positioned in the front yard, adding visual interest to the landscape. The house includes a covered porch area supported by columns, and multiple large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades. The fencing is uniform and encloses the entire property, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and a fenced yard with a circular front feature and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, circular yard feature, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back facade, roof complexity, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the two-story section, large window, and the driveway curving along the side of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear and side windows, the lawn, and the circular feature in the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual rectangular windows
